violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of pizza trays were observed in contact with rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC removed pizza trays and sanitized them. Pizza trays to no longer be stored on bottom shelf until pest activity is resolved. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in various location of facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage and entrances, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving inside of cupboards in the bar area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The wall in the storage area next to the kitchen has a large hole in the bottom of it. Droppings were observed inside of hole. Area to be cleaned and hole to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Various cheeses was observed held at (46-52 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of cheese. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The presence of rodents and flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
1 Dr Refrigerator located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(broken handles). New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen shelves and have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The: 1.floor tiles in kitchen and bar area(missing tiles) 2.ceilings bar storage area(observed a hole) 3.walls in bar storage area (wood paneling is damaged observed with holes and peeling off wall) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
